metadata.known_reference_phrase: Oh, I've completed the Nicolas Cage event.
metadata.name: ASR manual results seed
metadata.warning: Manual records only. No provider calls, transcription, audio, transcripts, endpoints, or API keys are stored here.
metadata.accepted_status_policy: Reserved for a future provider/model with project-specific scoring at or above the strict gate plus Term QA and explicit user review.
metadata.candidate_status_policy: Promising or useful for retesting/fallback, but not accepted and not final truth.
metadata.blocked_status_policy: No comparable quality score was produced; blocked rows are not quality-rejected and must not be ranked as quality-rejected.
metadata.external_lead_policy: External leaderboard and user-observation rows are research leads unless separately scored on the project reference clip.
metadata.leading_project_candidate: ElevenLabs / Scribe v2 with keyterms at 84.95% project reference accuracy; candidate only.
metadata.leading_local_candidate: whisper.cpp / Vulkan large-v3-turbo phrase prompt at 74.19% project reference accuracy; local/offline fallback only.
metadata.blocked_provider_note: AWS Transcribe custom vocabulary is blocked by access/subscription state in the current seed, not quality-rejected.

records.notes: Best tested online ASR provider result so far. Preserved the critical phrase and found Shadowsmith, Nicolas Cage, and Caltheris, but missed Kingman, ZoneX, Freckelston, and Nyxara. Treat as a leading optional cloud integration candidate, not final truth.
Best tested no-cloud/free local fallback currently recorded on the AMD RX 5700 path. Accuracy is approximate from local docs and remains below the 95% acceptance threshold.

Rejected for integration for now. Below the 95% threshold and did not beat the best local whisper.cpp Vulkan result. Rendered the key phrase as 'it's weird, the Nicolas Cage event' and rendered Caltheris as Calpheon.
Rejected for integration for now. Prompting fixed Caltheris but did not improve WER/reference accuracy, and the key phrase still failed.
Rejected for integration for now. Found Shadowsmith, Nicolas Cage, and Caltheris, but strict reference accuracy was only 66.67% and the critical phrase became 'Fuck. We have Nicolas Cage event'.
Rejected for integration for now. Found Shadowsmith, Nicolas Cage, and Caltheris, but strict reference accuracy was only 65.59% and the critical phrase became 'I played the Nicolas Cage event'.
Rejected for integration for now. The en-US and en-GB phrase-list runs produced the same score; Azure rendered the key phrase as 'I believe the Nicolas Cage event' and Caltheris as 'Cal fearless'.
Rejected for integration for now. Same result as the en-US phrase-list run.
Rejected for integration for now. Best Google v1 phrase-hint run, but it failed the critical phrase and all tracked important terms.
Rejected for integration for now. Missed all tracked important terms and rendered the key phrase as 'I believe the Nicholas Cage event'.
Rejected for integration for now. Worse than Google video enhanced and failed the critical phrase plus key glossary terms.

Blocked before any transcription job could run. CreateVocabulary failed in eu-west-2 / Europe London with SubscriptionRequiredException: The AWS Access Key Id needs a subscription for the service. No transcript candidate or score was produced, so AWS is not ranked against tested providers.
User-supplied external Voicewriter leaderboard note. Raw WER mean 5.4%, std dev 4.6%; formatted WER mean 12.2%, std dev 4.8%. Not locally scored on the project reference clip.
User-supplied external Voicewriter leaderboard note. Raw WER mean 5.5%, std dev 4.9%; formatted WER mean 13.5%, std dev 5.0%. Not locally scored on the project reference clip.
User-supplied external Voicewriter leaderboard note. Raw WER mean 5.8%, std dev 4.5%; formatted WER mean 14.2%, std dev 5.0%. Not locally scored on the project reference clip.
User-supplied external Voicewriter leaderboard note. Raw WER mean 4.0%, std dev 2.5%; formatted WER mean 12.4%, std dev 4.4%. Not locally scored on the project reference clip.
User-supplied external Voicewriter leaderboard note. Raw WER mean 5.3%, std dev 6.2%; formatted WER mean 7.9%, std dev 0.8%. Not locally scored on the project reference clip.

records.model: Instagram-adjacent STT observation / SeamlessM4T v2 leads
records.notes: User observed Instagram speech-to-text was fast and mostly correct. Related leads preserved for later research: https://seamless.metademolab.com/demo ; https://www.edenai.co/ ; https://huggingface.co/docs/transformers/en/model_doc/seamless_m4t_v2 . Not locally scored and not integrated.

User-supplied Groq/VillFlowSTT lead: https://github.com/SreekarGpalli/VillFlowSTT/releases . Reddit quote describes it as a Windows dictation tool powered by Groq. Not locally scored and not integrated.
User-supplied benchmark lead: https://artificialanalysis.ai/speech-to-text/non-streaming . Preserve as a research lead only; verify before product decisions.
User-supplied benchmark lead: https://huggingface.co/spaces/hf-audio/open_asr_leaderboard . Preserve as a research lead only; verify before product decisions.
User-supplied benchmark/reference lead: https://www.braintrust.dev/blog/voice-evals-stt . Preserve as a research lead only; verify before product decisions.
User-supplied lead: https://github.com/Kochava-Studios/witsy . Not locally scored and not integrated.
User-supplied lead: https://console.kolwrite.com/ . Not locally scored and not integrated.
User-supplied local/offline/browser/STT leads: wasm-speech-streaming, efficient-nlp/wasm-streaming-speech, moshi, and lucky-bai/transformers. Not locally scored and not integrated.
